Okay, let's infuse the category and channel names with literary and biblical references. Here's a revised structure, aiming for evocative and thematically consistent titles:
The First Wives Club
I. 📜 The Sacred Scrolls & Daily Manna (Daily Offerings)
* #your-name-daily-verse (e.g., #chris-daily-verse)
* #jessicas-daily-psalm
* #maddies-daily-proverb
II. 📚 The Apocrypha & Ancient Lore
* #daily-inspiration (Renamed from #daily-invocation-or-axiom)
* #snippets-from-the-sages (Renamed from #curiosity-cabinets)
* #the-lost-library (Renamed from #the-ancient-grimoires)
* #verse-of-the-poets (Renamed from #verse-of-the-cosmos)
* #literary-disputations (Renamed from #mystic-discourses - Optional)
